results.name: trial_balance
results.plan:
Sort  (cost=35.96..36.39 rows=170 width=470)
  Sort Key: accounting_chartofaccount.code
  ->  HashAggregate  (cost=27.11..29.66 rows=170 width=470)
        Group Key: accounting_chartofaccount.code, accounting_chartofaccount.name, accounting_chartofaccount.account_type
        ->  Hash Join  (cost=13.97..23.74 rows=270 width=446)
              Hash Cond: (accounting_journalentryline.account_id = accounting_chartofaccount.id)
              ->  Nested Loop  (cost=0.15..9.20 rows=270 width=48)
                    ->  Seq Scan on accounting_journalentry  (cost=0.00..1.02 rows=1 width=8)
                          Filter: (is_posted AND (entry_date >= '2026-03-01'::date) AND (entry_date <= '2026-03-31'::date) AND (company_id = 5) AND (branch_id = 6))
                    ->  Index Scan using acc_jline_entry_line_idx on accounting_journalentryline  (cost=0.15..8.17 rows=1 width=56)
                          Index Cond: (journal_entry_id = accounting_journalentry.id)
              ->  Hash  (cost=11.70..11.70 rows=170 width=414)
                    ->  Seq Scan on accounting_chartofaccount  (cost=0.00..11.70 rows=170 width=414)
results.sql: SELECT "accounting_chartofaccount"."code" AS "account__code", "accounting_chartofaccount"."name" AS "account__name", "accounting_chartofaccount"."account_type" AS "account__account_type", COALESCE(SUM("accounting_journalentryline"."debit_base"), 0.00) AS "debit_total", COALESCE(SUM("accounting_journalentryline"."credit_base"), 0.00) AS "credit_total" FROM "accounting_journalentryline" INNER JOIN "accounting_journalentry" ON ("accounting_journalentryline"."journal_entry_id" = "accounting_journalentry"."id") INNER JOIN "accounting_chartofaccount" ON ("accounting_journalentryline"."account_id" = "accounting_chartofaccount"."id") WHERE ("accounting_journalentry"."company_id" = 5 AND "accounting_journalentry"."is_posted" AND "accounting_journalentry"."branch_id" = 6 AND "accounting_journalentry"."entry_date" >= 2026-03-01 AND "accounting_journalentry"."entry_date" <= 2026-03-31) GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 ORDER BY 1 ASC

results.name: general_ledger
results.plan:
Sort  (cost=20.78..20.78 rows=2 width=1370)
  Sort Key: accounting_journalentry.entry_date, accounting_journalentryline.journal_entry_id, accounting_journalentryline.line_no
  ->  Nested Loop  (cost=0.27..20.77 rows=2 width=1370)
        ->  Nested Loop  (cost=0.15..20.30 rows=2 width=713)
              ->  Seq Scan on accounting_chartofaccount  (cost=0.00..12.12 rows=1 width=449)
                    Filter: ((code)::text = '1101'::text)
              ->  Index Scan using acc_jline_account_created_idx on accounting_journalentryline  (cost=0.15..8.17 rows=1 width=264)
                    Index Cond: (account_id = accounting_chartofaccount.id)
        ->  Index Scan using accounting_journalentry_pkey on accounting_journalentry  (cost=0.12..0.20 rows=1 width=657)
              Index Cond: (id = accounting_journalentryline.journal_entry_id)
              Filter: (is_posted AND (entry_date >= '2026-03-01'::date) AND (entry_date <= '2026-03-31'::date) AND (company_id = 5) AND (branch_id = 6))
results.sql: SELECT "accounting_journalentryline"."id", "accounting_journalentryline"."journal_entry_id", "accounting_journalentryline"."line_no", "accounting_journalentryline"."account_id", "accounting_journalentryline"."account_code_snapshot", "accounting_journalentryline"."currency", "accounting_journalentryline"."fx_rate", "accounting_journalentryline"."amount_tx", "accounting_journalentryline"."debit_base", "accounting_journalentryline"."credit_base", "accounting_journalentryline"."meta_json", "accounting_journalentryline"."created_at", "accounting_journalentry"."id", "accounting_journalentry"."draft_id", "accounting_journalentry"."period_id", "accounting_journalentry"."company_id", "accounting_journalentry"."branch_id", "accounting_journalentry"."entry_date", "accounting_journalentry"."description", "accounting_journalentry"."debit_total", "accounting_journalentry"."credit_total", "accounting_journalentry"."is_posted", "accounting_journalentry"."posted_at", "accounting_journalentry"."posted_by_id", "accounting_journalentry"."reversed_entry_id", "accounting_journalentry"."metadata", "accounting_chartofaccount"."id", "accounting_chartofaccount"."company_id", "accounting_chartofaccount"."code", "accounting_chartofaccount"."name", "accounting_chartofaccount"."account_type", "accounting_chartofaccount"."parent_id", "accounting_chartofaccount"."is_postable", "accounting_chartofaccount"."is_active", "accounting_chartofaccount"."is_revaluable", "accounting_chartofaccount"."created_at", "accounting_chartofaccount"."updated_at" FROM "accounting_journalentryline" INNER JOIN "accounting_chartofaccount" ON ("accounting_journalentryline"."account_id" = "accounting_chartofaccount"."id") INNER JOIN "accounting_journalentry" ON ("accounting_journalentryline"."journal_entry_id" = "accounting_journalentry"."id") WHERE ("accounting_chartofaccount"."code" = 1101 AND "accounting_journalentry"."company_id" = 5 AND "accounting_journalentry"."is_posted" AND "accounting_journalentry"."branch_id" = 6 AND "accounting_journalentry"."entry_date" >= 2026-03-01 AND "accounting_journalentry"."entry_date" <= 2026-03-31) ORDER BY "accounting_journalentry"."entry_date" ASC, "accounting_journalentryline"."journal_entry_id" ASC, "accounting_journalentryline"."line_no" ASC

results.name: intercompany_cycle
results.plan:
Sort  (cost=11.13..11.14 rows=1 width=1266)
  Sort Key: created_at, id
  ->  Seq Scan on accounting_intercompanytransaction  (cost=0.00..11.12 rows=1 width=1266)
        Filter: (((status)::text = ANY ('{PENDING,DIFFERENCE,DISPUTED}'::text[])) AND ((source_company_id = 5) OR (target_company_id = 5)))
results.sql: SELECT "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."id", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."tx_id", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."source_company_id", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."target_company_id", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."source_journal_entry_id", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."target_journal_entry_id", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."status", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."reference_code", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."currency", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."amount", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."source_account_code", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."target_account_code", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."source_side", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."target_side", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."matched_amount_source", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."matched_amount_target", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."difference_amount", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."description", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."metadata_json", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."created_by_id", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."confirmed_by_id", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."closed_by_id", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."created_at", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."confirmed_at", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."closed_at", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."updated_at" FROM "accounting_intercompanytransaction" WHERE (("accounting_intercompanytransaction"."source_company_id" = 5 OR "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."target_company_id" = 5) AND "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."status" IN (PENDING, DIFFERENCE, DISPUTED)) ORDER BY "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."created_at" ASC, "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."id" ASC

results.name: consolidation_scope
results.plan:
Sort  (cost=8.18..8.18 rows=1 width=1266)
  Sort Key: created_at, id
  ->  Index Scan using acc_ic_tgt_status_created_idx on accounting_intercompanytransaction  (cost=0.14..8.17 rows=1 width=1266)
        Index Cond: ((target_company_id = 5) AND (created_at >= '2026-03-01 06:00:00+00'::timestamp with time zone) AND (created_at <= '2026-04-01 05:59:59.999999+00'::timestamp with time zone))
        Filter: (((status)::text = ANY ('{CONFIRMED,CLOSED}'::text[])) AND (source_company_id = 5))
results.sql: SELECT "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."id", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."tx_id", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."source_company_id", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."target_company_id", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."source_journal_entry_id", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."target_journal_entry_id", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."status", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."reference_code", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."currency", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."amount", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."source_account_code", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."target_account_code", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."source_side", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."target_side", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."matched_amount_source", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."matched_amount_target", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."difference_amount", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."description", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."metadata_json", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."created_by_id", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."confirmed_by_id", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."closed_by_id", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."created_at", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."confirmed_at", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."closed_at", "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."updated_at" FROM "accounting_intercompanytransaction" WHERE ("accounting_intercompanytransaction"."created_at" >= 2026-03-01 00:00:00-06:00 AND "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."created_at" <= 2026-03-31 23:59:59.999999-06:00 AND "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."source_company_id" IN (5) AND "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."status" IN (CONFIRMED, CLOSED) AND "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."target_company_id" IN (5)) ORDER BY "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."created_at" ASC, "accounting_intercompanytransaction"."id" ASC
